title: hymenophyllum edanoi
intro: Hymenophyllum edanoi, also known as the Edano's scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is native to the Philippines and is used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum edanoi include treating various skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as reducing fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Hymenophyllum edanoi include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
